name: Minature Reubens
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Arrange bread slices on a large cookie sheet.
3. Bake for 5 minutes or until lightly browned on one side. Remove the cookie sheet from the oven.
4. In a small bowl, stir together mayonnaise, chili sauce, horseradish, and green pepper until blended. (You could substitute with 1,000 Island dressing).
5. Using a knife, spread some of the mayo mixture on the toasted side of each bread slice.
6. Top each slice with some corned beef, sauerkraut, then cheese, cutting the corned beef and cheese slices to fit.
7. Bake for about 10 minutes or until cheese is melted. Serve immediately.
Makes about 3 dozen canapés. Each canape: About 60 calories, 4 g fat, 10 mg cholesterol, 135 mg sodium.
